verdict.answer_first: B leads with the diagnostic action in sentence 1: "open the browser Network tab, reproduce, and count"; A opens with "Good news" before the prescription.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one first move: "first bisect where the duplication happens"; A adds a larger workflow plus "durable fix" and more branches.
verdict.fabrication: A uses unsupported timing bands like "< ~50ms" and "100–500ms"; B also uses "100–300ms" but fewer invented thresholds.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute: count requests, inspect listeners with "getEventListeners(formEl)", then add one log snippet; A is useful but heavier.
